title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Blue Dart Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Blue Dart Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Blue Dart Digital Technologies family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Faridabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Blue Dart Digital Technologies:
Blue Dart Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Dart Digital Technologies!
